title: The Roadless Rule And New Life For The Tongass National Forest
summary: The wavering roadless rule is the latest contention between the timber industry and sustainable use in the Tongass National Forest. The post The Roadless Rule And New Life For The Tongass National Forest appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Seven cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta on July 8
summary: On July 8, YKHC reports seven cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 7 residents are in: Akiak (1) Bethel (2) Chevak (1) Hooper Bay (1) Kotlik (2) — COVID-19 Updates and Community Information Vaccinations: YKHC strongly encourages everyone 6 months and older to get vaccinated agai...
